MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW'S Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement. Andrew L. Packard, Esq., Law Offices of Andrew L. Packard, (707) 763-7227, appearing for Plaintiff, and moving party. There are no other appearances. Counsel is appearing to have Order signed. the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion Granted.
